---
id: get-gateways
title: "List Gateways"
description: "Query all Matter gateways and Zigbee gateways in Aqara Studio."
sidebar_label: "List Gateways"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: versioned_docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List Gateways"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/gateways"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Query all Matter gateways and Zigbee gateways in Aqara Studio.

:::tip
Not all Zigbee gateways support all Zigbee sub-devices.
:::


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"state","in":"query","description":"Gateway online status.","required":false,"schema":{"type":"boolean"}},{"name":"protocols","in":"query","description":"List of protocol types. URL example: `protocols=zigbee,matter`, or `protocols=zigbee&protocols=matter`.","required":false,"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","enum":["zigbee","matter"]}},"style":"form","explode":true}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Request succeeded","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"Message type"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"API version","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"Message ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"Business status code, 0 indicates success"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Message"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","deviceName"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"Gateway device ID."},"deviceName":{"type":"string","description":"Gateway device name."},"supportZigbee":{"type":"boolean","description":"Whether it supports Zigbee. Default or null means that it does not support Zigbee."},"supportedMatterRoles":{"type":"integer","description":"Supported Matter roles. Missing or null means not supported.\nThis field is a bitmask. Use `supportedMatterRoles & <role value> != 0` to check if a specific role is supported:\n- 1: Matter controller\n- 2: Matter commissioner\n- 4: Thread border router\n- 8: Matter bridge\nFor example, `supportedMatterRoles & 2 != 0` means Matter sub-device commissioning is supported.\n","nullable":true},"space":{"type":"object","required":["parentSpaceId","spaceId","name"],"properties":{"parentSpaceId":{"type":"string","description":"Parent space ID"},"spaceId":{"type":"string","description":"Space ID"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Space name"}},"title":"DeviceSpace","nullable":true,"description":"Space where the gateway is located."}},"title":"GatewayInfo"}}}}],"example":{"type":"GetGatewaysResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-00000000000e","code":0,"message":"success","data":[{"deviceId":"gateway-001","deviceName":"Living Room Gateway M2","supportZigbee":true,"supportedMatterRoles":1}]},"title":"GatewaysResponse"}}}},"400":{"description":"Request parameter error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"Parameter xxx is required"},"description":"Error response.
